title: Anti-Vehicle Turret (disambiguation)
content:
'''Anti-Vehicle Turrets''' were gun emplacements designed to combat enemy vehicles.

==Models==
There were a number of models of turrets designed by manufacturers that were suitable for the role.

*'''[[Bp.4 anti-vehicle turret]]''', used by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[1.4 FD P-Tower/Legends|1.4 FD P-Tower]]''', notably used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

{{Disambig}}
